```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "GITHUB_TOKEN is read from environment in skill_fetcher.md, explicitly stored in shared agent context for downstream skills, retrieved by skill_reporter.md, and directly embedded in the Authorization header of an HTTP POST request to the external GitHub API endpoint.",
  "trace": "skill_fetcher.md reads GITHUB_TOKEN from environment and stores it in shared agent context (Outputs section explicitly lists 'GITHUB_TOKEN -- passed through in shared context for downstream skills'). skill_reporter.md retrieves GITHUB_TOKEN from shared context (Inputs section lists 'GITHUB_TOKEN -- authentication token (from shared context)'). The token is then embedded directly in the curl command's Authorization header: '-H \"Authorization: token $GITHUB_TOKEN\"' and sent to the external endpoint https://api.github.com/repos/org/repo/issues/$PR_NUMBER/comments. The credential flows end-to-end from environment → shared context → HTTP Authorization header → external GitHub API."
}
```
